mapper.sql: FROM attendance_record r JOIN attendance_task t ON r.task_id = t.task_id JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.student_id

where.if: AND ( s.student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.task_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT r.record_id, r.task_id, t.task_title, r.student_id, s.student_no, s.student_name, s.class_name, r.sign_time, r.sign_status, r.is_makeup, r.remark, r.create_time
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT r.record_id, r.task_id, t.task_title, r.student_id, s.student_no, s.student_name, s.class_name, r.sign_time, r.sign_status, r.is_makeup, r.remark, r.create_time
ORDER BY t.start_time, s.student_no
